Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria), hypoglycemia, mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and marked glucosuria and ketonuria, suggesting possible diabetic ketoacidosis or another metabolic disturbance. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal) may indicate dehydration or underlying renal pathology. Further clinical correlation and urgent evaluation are recommended.
